name: The Meadows Driving Range
about: Meadows Golf Club is an 18-hole championship course located in Littleton, Colorado, offering country club-level conditions at an affordable price. The course features a links-style layout stretching over 7,000 yards from the back tees, with forward tees measuring approximately 5,400 yards. It is characterized by target-oriented play with bunkering, water hazards, and native grass areas. While primarily an outdoor course, it is managed by Foothills Park & Recreation District, which also operates a separate indoor golf simulator facility at its Foothills Golf Course location. The venue provides a full-service restaurant, pro shop, and hosts various tournaments and events.
why_golfers_like_it: Country club course conditions at an affordable price
Challenging links-style layout with mountain views
Full-service restaurant and lounge facility available
Hosts numerous State qualifiers and championships
Variety of wildlife and natural beauty throughout the course

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu available for Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner at The Meadows Restaurant, open to the public.
Craft cocktails, wines, and brews are served at The Meadows Restaurant.

simulator_hardware.notes: Located at Foothills Golf Course, not directly at Meadows Golf Club.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Rental clubs are available for men's, women's, left-handed, and right-handed options. Players are also welcome to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The full-service restaurant, The Meadows Grill, offers a variety of food and drink options. The restaurant is open to the public.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The course can be a great workout for walking golfers. A large fleet of carts is available for golfers who prefer to relax during their round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior classes and is considered a favorite for families and juniors.
